name: permission_contract

admission_outcomes.constrain: decision may proceed only under returned limits
admission_outcomes.delay: decision must wait for admissibility conditions
admission_outcomes.halt: decision flow must pause pending restored integrity

control_obligation: integrators must treat non-admissible decision states as binding and non-advisory
proof_obligation: when auditability is required, integrators must bind the decision to its decision_id and retrieve /v1/proof/{decision_id}
